docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY JIN, YI AS TO DEFENDANT KEMP, KELLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED SEP-29-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KEMP, KELLY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIN, YI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEMP, KELLY $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KEMP, KELLY
